use std::fs;
use std::io::Write;

// BAD: let _ = fallible_call() ignoring errors
fn process_and_log(path: &str) {
    let content = fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
    let _ = fs::write("/tmp/cache.txt", &content);
    let _ = log::info!("processed {}", path);
}

fn cleanup(temp_dir: &str) {
    let _ = fs::remove_dir_all(temp_dir);
    let _ = fs::remove_file("/tmp/lock");
}

fn send_notification(msg: &str) {
    let _ = http_post("https://notify.example.com", msg);
    let _ = write_to_log(msg);
}
